description: Image classification config with invalid learning rate and wrong optimizer name
artifact:
# ResNet-50 Image Classification Training Config
model:
  architecture: resnet50
  num_classes: 10
  pretrained: true
  hidden_size: 512

training:
  learning_rate: 100.0
  optimizer: adm
  batch_size: 64
  epochs: 50
  weight_decay: 0.0001
  momentum: 0.9
  gradient_clip: 1.0

data:
  dataset: cifar10
  val_split: 0.2
  augmentation: true
  num_workers: 4

scheduler:
  type: cosine
  warmup_epochs: 5
  min_lr: 0.00001

logging:
  log_interval: 10
  save_interval: 5
  seed: 42

description: Text classification config with negative batch size and dropout > 1.0
artifact:
# BERT Text Classification Config
model:
  architecture: bert-base-uncased
  num_classes: 5
  hidden_size: 768
  num_layers: 12
  dropout: 1.5
  max_seq_len: 512

training:
  learning_rate: 0.00002
  optimizer: adamw
  batch_size: -32
  epochs: 10
  weight_decay: 0.01
  gradient_clip: 1.0
  warmup_steps: 100

data:
  dataset: imdb
  val_split: 0.1
  num_workers: 2
  shuffle: true

scheduler:
  type: linear
  warmup_ratio: 0.1

logging:
  log_interval: 50
  seed: 123
  eval_steps: 500
  loss_function: cross_entropy

description: Regression model with zero epochs and string weight_decay
artifact:
# Housing Price Regression Config
model:
  architecture: mlp
  input_dim: 13
  hidden_dims: [256, 128, 64]
  output_dim: 1
  activation: relu
  dropout: 0.0

training:
  learning_rate: 0.001
  optimizer: adam
  batch_size: 128
  epochs: 0
  weight_decay: none
  gradient_clip: 5.0

data:
  dataset: boston_housing
  val_split: 0.2
  normalize: true
  num_workers: 0

loss:
  function: mse
  reduction: mean

scheduler:
  type: step
  step_size: 30
  gamma: 0.1

logging:
  seed: 7
  log_interval: 20
  save_best: true

description: Object detection config with negative learning rate and hidden_size of 0
artifact:
# YOLOv5 Object Detection Config
model:
  architecture: yolov5s
  num_classes: 80
  hidden_size: 0
  input_size: 640
  anchors: auto

training:
  learning_rate: -0.001
  optimizer: sgd
  batch_size: 16
  epochs: 300
  weight_decay: 0.0005
  momentum: 0.937
  gradient_clip: 10.0

data:
  dataset: coco
  val_split: 0.1
  mosaic: true
  num_workers: 8

augmentation:
  hsv_h: 0.015
  hsv_s: 0.7
  hsv_v: 0.4
  flip_lr: 0.5

scheduler:
  type: cosine
  warmup_epochs: 3
  min_lr: 0.0001

logging:
  seed: 0
  save_interval: 10
  eval_interval: 5

description: LLM fine-tuning config with seed as string and zero num_layers
artifact:
# LLaMA Fine-tuning Config
model:
  architecture: llama-7b
  num_layers: 0
  hidden_size: 4096
  num_heads: 32
  vocab_size: 32000
  max_seq_len: 2048
  lora_rank: 16

training:
  learning_rate: 0.0002
  optimizer: adamw
  batch_size: 1
  epochs: 3
  weight_decay: 0.1
  gradient_clip: 1.0
  gradient_accumulation: 8

data:
  dataset: alpaca
  val_split: 0.05
  num_workers: 4
  tokenizer: llama
  max_length: 512

scheduler:
  type: cosine
  warmup_ratio: 0.03

logging:
  seed: random
  log_interval: 10
  eval_steps: 200
  save_total_limit: 3

description: Time-series forecasting with val_split > 1.0 and gradient_clip of 0
artifact:
# LSTM Time-Series Forecasting Config
model:
  architecture: lstm
  input_dim: 7
  hidden_size: 128
  num_layers: 2
  output_dim: 1
  dropout: 0.2
  bidirectional: false

training:
  learning_rate: 0.001
  optimizer: adam
  batch_size: 32
  epochs: 200
  weight_decay: 0.0001
  gradient_clip: 0

data:
  dataset: electricity
  val_split: 1.5
  lookback_window: 96
  forecast_horizon: 24
  num_workers: 2

scheduler:
  type: reduce_on_plateau
  factor: 0.5
  patience: 10

logging:
  seed: 2024
  log_interval: 25
  early_stopping_patience: 20
  save_best: true

description: Recommendation system with loss_function mismatch and batch_size of 0
artifact:
# Neural Collaborative Filtering Config
model:
  architecture: ncf
  num_users: 6040
  num_items: 3706
  embedding_dim: 64
  hidden_dims: [256, 128, 64]
  dropout: 0.3

training:
  learning_rate: 0.001
  optimizer: adam
  batch_size: 0
  epochs: 20
  weight_decay: 0.0001
  gradient_clip: 5.0

data:
  dataset: movielens-1m
  val_split: 0.2
  negative_samples: 4
  num_workers: 4

loss:
  function: mse
  reduction: mean

scheduler:
  type: step
  step_size: 5
  gamma: 0.5

logging:
  seed: 42
  log_interval: 100
  eval_metrics: [hit_rate, ndcg]
  top_k: 10

description: GAN training with dropout -0.1 and learning_rate 100
artifact:
# DCGAN Training Config
model:
  generator:
    latent_dim: 100
    hidden_size: 256
    output_channels: 3
  discriminator:
    input_channels: 3
    hidden_size: 256
    dropout: -0.1

training:
  learning_rate: 100.0
  optimizer: adam
  batch_size: 64
  epochs: 200
  beta1: 0.5
  beta2: 0.999
  gradient_clip: 1.0

data:
  dataset: celeba
  image_size: 64
  val_split: 0.1
  num_workers: 4

scheduler:
  type: none

logging:
  seed: 99
  log_interval: 50
  save_interval: 10
  fid_eval_interval: 20

description: Transformer with max_seq_len -1 (invalid context) and num_workers -1 (invalid)

description: Semantic segmentation with wrong loss for task and invalid dropout
artifact:
# U-Net Semantic Segmentation Config
model:
  architecture: unet
  encoder: resnet34
  num_classes: 21
  input_channels: 3
  dropout: 1.8
  bilinear: true

training:
  learning_rate: 0.0001
  optimizer: adam
  batch_size: 4
  epochs: 100
  weight_decay: 0.0005
  gradient_clip: 5.0

data:
  dataset: voc2012
  val_split: 0.15
  image_size: 512
  num_workers: 4

loss:
  function: mse
  class_weights: auto

scheduler:
  type: polynomial
  power: 0.9

logging:
  seed: 21
  log_interval: 20
  eval_iou_threshold: 0.5
  save_predictions: true

description: Speech recognition with epochs 0 and negative momentum
artifact:

description: Diffusion model with weight_decay as string and learning_rate 50
artifact:
# Stable Diffusion Fine-tuning Config
model:
  architecture: stable-diffusion-v1-5
  unet_channels: 320
  num_layers: 4
  attention_heads: 8
  resolution: 512
  use_ema: true

training:
  learning_rate: 50.0
  optimizer: adamw
  batch_size: 1
  epochs: 100
  weight_decay: auto
  gradient_clip: 1.0
  mixed_precision: fp16
  gradient_accumulation: 4

data:
  dataset: laion-aesthetic
  val_split: 0.05
  resolution: 512
  num_workers: 8
  center_crop: true

scheduler:
  type: constant_with_warmup
  warmup_steps: 500

logging:
  seed: 42
  log_interval: 50
  save_interval: 500
  sample_interval: 200

description: RL PPO config with negative batch_size and val_split > 1
artifact:
# PPO Reinforcement Learning Config
model:
  architecture: actor_critic
  hidden_dims: [64, 64]
  activation: tanh
  orthogonal_init: true
  dropout: 0.0

training:
  learning_rate: 0.0003
  optimizer: adam
  batch_size: -64
  epochs: 10
  weight_decay: 0.0
  gradient_clip: 0.5
  ppo_epochs: 4
  clip_range: 0.2
  value_coef: 0.5
  entropy_coef: 0.01

data:
  env_name: CartPole-v1
  val_split: 2.0
  num_envs: 8
  total_timesteps: 1000000
  rollout_steps: 128

scheduler:
  type: linear

logging:
  seed: 1
  log_interval: 1
  eval_interval: 10000
  num_eval_episodes: 10

description: Vision Transformer with dropout > 1, negative weight_decay, and wrong seed type
artifact:
# ViT Image Classification Config
model:
  architecture: vit-base-patch16
  num_classes: 1000
  hidden_size: 768
  num_layers: 12
  num_heads: 12
  patch_size: 16
  image_size: 224
  dropout: 1.2

training:
  learning_rate: 0.0001
  optimizer: adamw
  batch_size: 256
  epochs: 300
  weight_decay: -0.05
  gradient_clip: 1.0
  warmup_epochs: 5
  mixup_alpha: 0.8

data:
  dataset: imagenet-1k
  val_split: 0.0
  augmentation: randaugment
  num_workers: 16
  pin_memory: true

scheduler:
  type: cosine
  min_lr: 0.000001

logging:
  seed: true
  log_interval: 100
  eval_interval: 5
  save_top_k: 3
